coordinate_source: Documented Grand St. Bernard pass coordinates (WGS84). The dataset's station_gsb_XY.txt provides per-station offsets in the Swiss CH1903 / LV03 projection but no direct WGS84 translation; deployment-level coordinates are used here.
uncertainty_notes: Latitude/longitude refer to the pass and are accurate to within ~1 km, sufficient for sunrise time computation (~4 s of arc per km in latitude).
